rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: Geo-Replication enables disaster recovery for cached data, even in the unlikely event of a widespread regional failure. This can be essential for mission-critical applications. We recommend that you configure passive geo-replication for Premium Azure Cache for Redis instances.
rules.query: where properties['sku']['name'] =~ "premium" and array_length(properties['linkedServers']) == 0 and properties['redisConfiguration']['rdb-backup-enabled'] != "true" and properties['redisConfiguration']['aof-backup-enabled'] != "true" and isempty(properties['redisConfiguration']['zonal-configuration']) and isnull(properties['replicasPerPrimary']) and isnull(properties['replicasPerMaster'])
rules.fix: Geo-Replication enables disaster recovery for cached data, even in the unlikely event of a widespread regional failure. This can be essential for mission-critical applications. We recommend that you configure passive geo-replication for Premium Azure Cache for Redis instances.
Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: To avoid service disruptions, migrate workloads to Azure Managed Redis before the retirement date.
rules.fix: To avoid service disruptions, migrate workloads to Azure Managed Redis before the retirement date.
